client_construction.code: c, err := opensearch.NewClient(opensearch.Config{Addresses: []string{addr}}); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: Index
primary_operations.sdk_call: var buf bytes.Buffer; if err := json.NewEncoder(&buf).Encode(doc); err != nil { return err }; res, err := s.client.Index(s.index, &buf); if err != nil { return err }; defer res.Body.Close(); return nil

primary_operations.name: Query
primary_operations.sdk_call: res, err := s.client.Search(s.client.Search.WithIndex(s.index), s.client.Search.WithBody(strings.NewReader(q))); if err != nil { return nil, err }; defer res.Body.Close(); var out []map[string]any; return out, json.NewDecoder(res.Body).Decode(&out)

code_style_notes: opensearch-go is a fork of go-elasticsearch with similar response API
res.IsError() must be checked — non-2xx HTTP is NOT a Go error
